_meta.description: Munger Protocol research template. Fill all fields with researched data.
_meta.instructions: Replace all placeholder strings with actual research. Booleans and numbers should be real values.

section_1.1b_predictability: YES/REVIEW/NO — 2-sentence rationale: is 10-year revenue predictable? Consider recurring vs one-off demand, structural necessity, and R&D/regulatory dependency.
section_1.1c_competence: 2 sentences on what domain expertise is required to value this business accurately, and how accessible it is to a generalist investor.
section_1.1d_confidence: Low (<50%) / Medium (50-75%) / High (>75%) — 1-sentence rationale based on business model stability and earnings visibility over 10 years.

moat_supply_side.evidence: 2-3 sentences on cost advantages, economies of scale, or supply-side moat.

moat_demand_side.evidence: 2-3 sentences on brand strength, switching costs, or demand-side moat.

moat_network_effect.evidence: 2-3 sentences on network effects, if any.

moat_ip_regulatory.evidence: 2-3 sentences on IP, patents, or regulatory barriers.

section_2.lollapalooza_potential: 2-3 sentences on converging forces that could create outsized returns.
section_2.moat_trajectory_evidence: 1-2 sentences with data evidence for moat trajectory.

section_3.candor_assessment: 2-3 sentences on shareholder letter tone, transparency, and management candor.
section_3.keymanrisk: 2 sentences on key-man risk and succession planning.

section_5.price_assessment: 3-4 sentences on whether the current stock price is sensible vs intrinsic value.

patience.note: 1-2 sentences — is this a fat pitch?

section_7.critical_mass: 2 sentences on critical mass and breakpoints.
section_7.redundancy: 2 sentences on backup growth engines and reliability.
section_7.niche_defense: 2 sentences on niche defense and competitive positioning.

section_8.synthesis: 3-4 sentences on whether forces converge for a lollapalooza and overall investment verdict.

section_9.permanent_loss_rationale: 2-3 sentences on probability of permanent capital loss.
section_9.opportunity_cost: 2-3 sentences comparing this investment to next-best alternative.
section_9.final_decision: BUY / WATCH / PASS / TOO_HARD / HOLD / SELL
section_9.final_rationale: 3-4 sentences synthesizing all sections into a final recommendation.
